name: Vitello Alla Francese
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the veal scallops lightly with a flat mallet.
2. Sprinkle the scallops with salt and pepper.
3. Dredge both sides of each scallop in flour.
4. In a shallow dish, beat the egg well and add milk, salt, and pepper. Blend the mixture.
5. Dip each veal scallop in the egg mixture to coat both sides.
6. Heat the butter in a very heavy skillet over medium heat until it begins to shimmer.
7. Add the veal scallops to the skillet and cook for about 2 minutes on one side, or until golden brown.
8. Turn the scallops and cook for an additional 2 minutes on the second side, until golden brown.
9. Remove the veal from the skillet using tongs.
10. Pour the lemon juice over the veal.
11. Garnish with lemon slices and sprinkle with parsley.
12. Serve with Spaghetti with Marinara Sauce.
